texts.title: We're using cookies
texts.description: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyze our traffic.

necessary.name: Necessary
necessary.description: These cookies are essential for the website to function correctly.

functional.name: Functional
functional.description: These cookies allow us to remember your preferences.

analytics.name: Analytics
analytics.description: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website.

marketing.name: Marketing
marketing.description: These cookies are used to show you relevant advertisements.
